sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13222" key="a)pomi/sgomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπομίσγομαι</orth>, <sense id="n13222.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">draw off and mix,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οἶνον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:1:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.5</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
